message: Familiar music... but with a slightly different style than my own.
The same song can sound completely different depending on who's playing it... Well, it might sound the same to everyone else.
Yuki...
The usual place... The usual piano... But the person playing was Yuki.
When I woke up, Yuki was sitting right next to me.
Yuki played with her eyes closed, but she had a smirk on her face, like she knew I was there.
I didn't think I was working today, though. Why is Yuki playing the piano here?
I looked around the room.
The same faggots as usual were here.
I always have to wonder... It's not like this is a gay bar or anything.
It's just supposed to be a normal bar. These guys probably all come here because Master has no morals.
...Huh?
That's... Takashima Zakuro...
Why's she here?

name: Yuki
message: "I'm here on a date. With her."
Yuki spoke only to me, with her eyes still closed.
Naturally, her mouth didn't actually move.

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean, a date?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, it was just a coincidence. I saw her on the train."

name: Tomosane
message: "On the train, huh..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What were you thinking? You're both girls, aren't you?"

name: Yuki
message: "But I look like a guy, don't I?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Still..."

name: Yuki
message: "You're in a bad mood, huh? What, are you jealous?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why would I be jealous of you?"
Yuki smiled and played the piano.
There was a certain lilt in the music that wasn't there before.
To the rest of them, it must have looked like she was just playing silently, but in reality she always talks a lot while she's playing.

name: Yuki
message: "I haven't played this piano in quite a while."

name: Tomosane
message: "You asked them to tune it, right? How is it?"

name: Yuki
message: "It feels really good. But it's been more than a month since I asked Master to get it tuned."

name: Tomosane
message: "They only finished tuning it earlier this week..."

name: Yuki
message: "That's a bit shady, but at least it still sounds good now since he only got it done last week."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... Pretty good timing there."

name: Yuki
message: "...Well, I wouldn't say that."
The performance ended.
Apparently Takashima Zakuro was really impressed by Yuki's playing... Listening to her praise, I could tell that the girl wasn't the kind of person I would get along with.
She wouldn't really like me... though she probably wouldn't come near if I was the personality in control.
I watched Yuki and Takashima talk as I thought about that.
Yuki got along with Takashima really well. Really, Yuki gets along well with anyone.
She's completely different from me and Mamiya Takuji.
If I had the kind of social skills she does...
I can't even imagine it.
Yuki is really something.
It's just such a pain in the ass talking to people...
I don't want to get involved with people if I don't have to. I don't want to talk to them, and I don't even want to go anywhere near them.
Especially not women. I can't stand people who can just cry at the drop of a hat, like it's a normal thing that people do all the time.
I never know how I'm supposed to talk to them.
Men are easier, since I can just hit them and then they stop bothering me.
Women are just a pain in the ass...
In other words, what really suits me is just being alone.

name: Yuki
message: "I hate people too, you know?"
I was only thinking that to myself, so even Yuki shouldn't have been able to hear it.
I was just thinking to myself, and yet―

name: Tomosane
message: "...How did you know what I was thinking?"

name: Yuki
message: "I just had a feeling... but it sounds like I guessed right."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... It was like you were replying to my inner thoughts."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh really... Lately, it feels like I've been able to hear your thoughts sometimes."

name: Yuki
message: "Though anyone watching would say that even this conversation is only in our thoughts."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, no one else can hear us right now. We can talk privately, just between the two of us."

name: Yuki
message: "The brain is a mysterious organ."

name: Tomosane
message: "I wouldn't call it mysterious. I'd just call it a piece of shit. That's what I always say..."

name: Yuki
message: "Anyway, like I said, you always say you hate people, but it's not like I enjoy their company either."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're not very convincing."

name: Yuki
message: "Why not? I like to be alone, too. I'm really good at being alone."

name: Tomosane
message: "How can you be good at being alone?"

name: Yuki
message: "What? Did you imagine something perverted?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't worry, I didn't think anything like that at all."

name: Yuki
message: "What's your problem? You can fantasize about me if you want."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why would I fantasize about you? That's ridiculous..."

name: Yuki
message: "Then who do you fantasize about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't fantasize about anyone. Shut up."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you don't have a good imagination so you prefer to watch porn? You don't really have many porno mags, though...
Oh! I get it! You only like 2D girls!"

name: Yuki
message: "But you don't have any ero manga either... Maybe you have a stash of porn on the computer?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're getting on my nerves. Are you going to keep spouting nonsense until I pop your bubble?"

name: Yuki
message: "But you do jerk off, don't you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't."

name: Yuki
message: "Liar. If a healthy boy didn't jerk off, the semen would start coming out in his sweat."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, it wouldn't... What the hell do you think a healthy boy is, anyway?"

name: Yuki
message: "Good boys are made of 50% kindness and 50% semen."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why, you... You're insulting all the boys in the country, you know?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, I'm complimenting them. I said 50% is made up of their innate kindness."

name: Tomosane
message: "And the other half is pure semen."

name: Yuki
message: "Isn't that about right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not right at all! It would be terrifying if that was true!"

name: Yuki
message: "L-Like I said, boys are scary!"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's dumb! Don't act scared about something stupid like that!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... All right, so if that's true, then there's semen coming out when you sweat, too. We do share the same body, you know?"

name: Yuki
message: "No way! That's awful! I'll get pregnant with your child!"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, wait... That's impossible for a lot of reasons."

name: Yuki
message: "But your semen is mixed in with my sweat, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'll kill you."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you wanna take a shot at me for old times' sake? No cheap shots!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Whoa, what's your problem? Why are you trying to fight me? And besides, there's no semen in my sweat!"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, right..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I am right! You can't even keep a straight face when you say that shit."

name: Yuki
message: "But you're not jerking off at all, right? Then there's gotta be semen in your sweat. By this point, it's probably pure semen."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why, you... All right, look here. This conversation is over. Drop it."

name: Yuki
message: "Then we can agree. You're sweating buckets of cum!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, right!"

name: Yuki
message: "You admitted it!"

name: Tomosane
message: "No! I'm not admitting it, I just don't want to talk about it! Besides, even if there was semen in my sweat, how the hell would you get pregnant from it?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't make me spell it out for you. I'm a sensitive girl, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "Did your brain leak out of your ears?"

name: Yuki
message: "Can't you be a bit more sensitive when you're talking to girls? You shouldn't tell a girl she has no brains."

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't even know where to start with that. You're the one who was saying semen over and over, so I don't know why you expect me to be sensitive!"

name: Yuki
message: "But don't I look like an innocent girl? I'm so cute, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "Not even a little."

name: Yuki
message: "Yes, I am. Are you stupid?"

name: Tomosane
message: "It's kind of rude to disregard someone's opinion and then top it off by calling them stupid."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay, let's get back to our serious conversation. Do you not have any interest in women?"

name: Tomosane
message: "This conversation wasn't serious for even one second... You're just making lewd jokes."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh come on, don't young guys like you get horny sometimes?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't..."

name: Yuki
message: "You have ED at your age?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not what I mean!"

name: Yuki
message: "Then what did you mean?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... You know, Mamiya Takuji probably loves doing stuff like that."

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya Takuji... does?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. That thing people do when they're alone..."

name: Yuki
message: "O-Oh, okay... Mamiya Takuji, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Doesn't he do that several times a day? That's probably why I don't feel any lust."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh... So I don't have to worry about getting pregnant. Good to know."

name: Tomosane
message: "That was impossible to begin with."

name: Yuki
message: "It was?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why do you sound so surprised?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Okay, let's start from the beginning. You share the same body as the two of us."

name: Yuki
message: "Share the same body... That's kind of erotic. I might be getting a little wet."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're not."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm. I think I understand. So you don't feel lust very often..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right."

name: Yuki
message: "So that's why you never got turned on by your cute older sister."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Neither me nor Hasaki... If you were a normal guy we could do some rape roleplay or something."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Shit... I forgot about Takashima-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "You were on a date with her, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "S-Sorry... I must be boring you, huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, n-not at all... S-Sorry, I was just having a mental meeting."

name: Zakuro
message: "A mental meeting?"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't you do that? I was just talking to the different mes in my head. You know, like, what should we have for dinner and stuff like that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, I understand. I do that too."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha. Plenty of people have mental meetings."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes. When I was going home earlier, I was thinking about this."

name: Zakuro
message: "Conductor Takashima! We've been running on empty since lunchtime! We will need to stop for refueling soon! McDonalds spotted at two o'clock! Pilot Takashima taking a 90 degree right turn in 200 meters!"

name: Zakuro
message: "We've infiltrated the store! All right, Loader Takashima! Load coins into the cannon! Ready, aim... Cannoneer Takashima! Now's your chance! Fire 100 yen! Bang!"

name: Zakuro
message: "You acquired one milkshake!
Something like that, ahahahahaha!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahahaha... L-Like that, huh?"
What on earth? And Yuki talks about me like we're having some kind of "mental meeting"?
Jeez...

name: Zakuro
message: "So what was that meeting about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Boys are made of kindness and semen... wasn't it?"

name: Yuki
message: "Like I can say that!"

name: Tomosane
message: "But it's the truth."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, I was just thinking, uh... there are two equal but opposite forces inside every man's heart."

name: Zakuro
message: "Equal but opposite forces?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. Boys have two opposing forces within them."

name: Zakuro
message: "What are those?"

name: Yuki
message: "The first is... lust."

name: Zakuro
message: "Lust?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. Lust for various things. The desire to make things your own. For instance, the girl they like."

name: Yuki
message: "Half of a man's heart is constantly awash with that lust."

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, y-you think so? Then... what's the other half?"

name: Yuki
message: "The other half... is kindness."

name: Zakuro
message: "Kindness?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes. They're always careful that they don't hurt the person they love with their lust. Boys are made of just such a kindness."

name: Yuki
message: "How about that?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "So what?"

name: Yuki
message: "Wasn't that pretty good? I didn't tell a lie! I'm pretty quick on my feet!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't know about that... Well, whatever. Look at her."

name: Tomosane
message: "She's bright red."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you're right."

name: Tomosane
message: "She got bright red when you said that."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh shit! She realized that was all sexual harassment?! What should I do, Tomosane? She saw right through me!"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I don't think she did..."

name: Yuki
message: "Then why is she blushing?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... It's not like she actually thinks you meant to say that boys are made up of semen and kindness."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? But the meaning is the same."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then maybe you were sexually harassing her."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh... I guess I was..."

name: Yuki
message: "That's a good point. I guess I'll have to give my title as the wittiest guy around to you."

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't want it! And when did you get the title in the first place?"

name: Yuki
message: "Way before you were born!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why, you... Now I'm sure your brain is leaking out your ears."
Yuki kept up a conversation with both me and Takashima in that vein.
She really is a talented girl.

name: Master
message: "All right... Time to close up shop."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... Why are you making me work until close?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, what's up with that?"

name: Master
message: "J-Jeez, it's weird how you and Yuki are both there at the same time. Well, whatever. Hey, Hasaki-chan."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Hasaki-chan is here?"

name: Tomosane
message: "...I remember she was supposed to work today. I wonder why she didn't come out."

name: Hasaki
message: "I didn't want to... bother you."

name: Yuki
message: "N-No! That girl was with me, not Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you trying to cover for me all of a sudden?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh... I knew it was you, Yuki. That's not what I was talking about."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, then why didn't you come talk with us?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Well... It seems like Tomo Nii-san hates me. He doesn't want to be around me, I guess."

name: Yuki
message: "What?"

name: Master
message: "You're bullying her again?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah, no..."

name: Hasaki
message: "He doesn't want his little sister in the house, so he plays eroge in the living room."

name: Master
message: "Whoa, what did you just say?"

name: Yuki
message: "What the hell?! Didn't you just say you don't jerk off?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why the hell would you say that here?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, what do you mean by jerk off?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, uh... It's a weightlifting term. They do it at the Olympics, you know, uh... The clean and jerk, I think?"

name: Master
message: "That's impossible... Why is Tomo-chan saying he doesn't masturbate at his age?"

name: Hasaki
message: "M-Masturbate?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "W-Wait! Wait just a second! Hasaki is right there, you know!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, d-don't worry about me. I'm fine... Um, Yuki-san, i-i-is that true?"
She couldn't even talk straight.

name: Yuki
message: "You know, he has all these cute girls around him, like me, or even you Hasaki, and me too! But he told me he's not attracted to us at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why would I lie about that?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh... So you're not attracted to us... at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you getting upset about that?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san, I think you're too self-centered. Why would I get upset about that?"
The vein in her forehead was bulging. It was kind of obvious.

name: Tomosane
message: "E-Either way, you should be happy, since there won't be any misunderstandings."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's right. How wonderful. Not like there would be any misunderstandings about me anyway."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you angry?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "You're so self-centered! Why would I get angry about that?"

name: Yuki
message: "But you don't feel anything for me either? You don't like the big sister archetype or the little sister archetype?"

name: Master
message: "Then maybe I'm his type?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You don't even show up on my radar!"

name: Master
message: "That's ridiculous. Why wouldn't I show up?"

name: Yuki
message: "What's your problem? If you don't think sisters are cute and you don't think old men are cute, it's like you're saying you don't like anyone!"
Uh, I don't think anyone finds old men cute...

name: Master
message: "If you don't like them, you should at least like me. I'm made of pure, unadulterated cuteness!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't go around telling normal people about your fucked up version of cute!"

name: Master
message: "Is incest normal, then?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Like I said, I'm not into that either!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Then... what do you think is cute?"

name: Tomosane
message: "H-Huh? What do I think is cute?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I'd like to know too."

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't think anything is cute... What the hell is 'cute' anyway? I'm not Mamiya..."

name: Yuki
message: "If you don't want to put it that way, then what do you like in a girl? You have to have a type, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "How would I know?! I've never thought about that!"

name: Master
message: "Maybe Ecchan's your type?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Who's Ecchan?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you glaring at me?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Who... is that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ecchan is a former officer in the self-defense force, and he's gay! His real name is Echizen Kousuke!"

name: Master
message: "Oh, that pretty boy was a mercenary, not an officer. He had such a squeaky voice I couldn't even believe he was a gun for hire."

name: Master
message: "I'd go crazy for that cute little lover boy if I could just hear him say, 'I want to break open Tomosane's vault of gold.'"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san's vault of gold? Wh-What's that?"

name: Master
message: "It might not actually be gold, but it's a vault that needs opening!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Keep your hands off my gold, old man."

name: Hasaki
message: "What are you guys talking about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Forget it!"

name: Yuki
message: "Then who is it?!"

name: Master
message: "Oh, I know! It's Kazu-chan!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Who's Kazu-chan...?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't look at me like it's my fault! That guy's not as old, but he's still a faggot! His real name is Hyoudou Kazutaka."

name: Master
message: "But you seem like you'd get along well with a hardcore sadist like him, Tomo-chan, and he's really rich too... I heard him say that he had 10 billion in the bank."

name: Tomosane
message: "That was a lie. No one rich comes here."

name: Master
message: "Oh, I wouldn't go that far. There are some pretty famous people who come in here. One of the famous people that's involved with this industry is... Abe-san, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That guy's just a plain old faggot!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san, there are a lot of rumors about you getting with men, aren't there?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's why he doesn't get turned on by us, Hasaki-chan. If there are that many rumors, then it must be true. I'm really sad to hear about all this."

name: Master
message: "If you just jump in bed with anyone who asks, the guys around here will eat you up in no time."

name: Tomosane
message: "You can't call those rumors! That's all just pure fabrication! And who said I was jumping in bed with any of those faggots?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Then who do you like?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't know!"
Wait... Is the conversation changing course?
Why are we talking about the person I like?

name: Master
message: "You don't have a favorite, huh? The other suspicious customers would be..."

name: Tomosane
message: "None of your customers are suspicious in this case..."

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, then maybe that girl from earlier."

name: Tomosane
message: "From earlier?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Uh, Takashima Zakuro?"
Not at all.
That's what I'd like to say, but...
I might be able to push Hasaki away if I say I like Takashima.

name: Hasaki
message: "O-Ohh... So you want to push me away."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait! How did you know what I was thinking?!"

name: Yuki
message: "I told her."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-Why, you! Why can you read my mind all of a sudden?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Which means... you really were thinking that. You want to push me away..."

name: Tomosane
message: "N-No, I didn't mean it in a bad way."

name: Tomosane
message: "Besides, I don't like anyone! I hate people in general!"

name: Yuki
message: "What's up with that? Do you think you can just say that and run away?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm not running away. Why do you think there has to be someone I like? I don't have any particular affection for anyone."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, so you just hate people, huh? That's how much you love yourself, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What makes you say that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Only myself can I love, so I hate all of the above.
By Tomosane."
This is getting a bit stupid. Whenever I talk to her, it's like we just get stuck in an infinite loop.

name: Tomosane
message: "And besides, you're mistaken if you think young men are turned on all the time."

name: Tomosane
message: "In my case, I'm sharing this body with another person. Some dumbass is dealing with all that lust."

name: Yuki
message: "What, are you saying I'm a horny bitch in heat?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "No! I'm not talking about you! Mamiya! I'm talking about Mamiya Takuji!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Takuji... Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. That's why I don't get turned on. It's not your fault, Hasaki, or yours, Yuki."

name: Master
message: "That's right. And it's not my fault either. I was scared for a second there when you said you didn't get turned on by such a beautiful guy like me."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're not even on my radar!"

name: Yuki
message: "Isn't this the first time all three of us have walked home together?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, anyone else would say there are only two people here... including Hasaki."

name: Hasaki
message: "No, that's not true."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki..."

name: Hasaki
message: "I feel like I can actually see both of you."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yuki-san is like my big sister... and Tomo Nii-san is a big stinking bully."

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki-chan!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Wha!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't just hug her all of a sudden. You're making me hug her too."

name: Hasaki
message: "Jeez... You always say stuff like that, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Like I said, he just gets embarrassed. He really wants to be nice to you."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's just one of your delusions."

name: Yuki
message: "My delusions, is it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What?"

name: Yuki
message: "Nothing."
Nothing, huh?
Yuki knows the real reason why I'm cold to Hasaki.
And we haven't explained that reason to Hasaki.
When Yuki is completely cut off... that will be the moment when Mamiya Takuji and I disappear.
Hasaki doesn't know.
If only Yuki remains, then there shouldn't be a problem.
Yuki is more human than us, and if nothing else she's definitely smart.
She's inherited all the abilities of Mamiya Takuji during the height of his prosperity.
She isn't twisted like me.
But if Hasaki knew that Mamiya Takuji and I were going to disappear... Well, that's why Yuki makes jokes like that but never says the truth.
When Yuki talks about the truth, she never jokes around.
She always speaks in a strong tone of voice and unconditionally denies our destiny.
She denies that my disappearance is inevitable.
And she argues without any basis or proof, which is unlike her. She just denies it based on her feelings.
We just got into an argument about it earlier, but it was a conversation that Hasaki couldn't hear.
Yuki loves Hasaki too.
She just wants to protect Hasaki.
Yuki seems to be searching for a different solution to our destiny.
And she's rushing to do it.
She was always talkative around me, but lately she's been even more so.
We'll pass each other by, and soon we'll never see each other again.
She seems to be striving for some other solution, some way to fight against our destiny.
Sometimes it pains me when she's trying so hard to be cheerful.
It's like she's just pretending... That's how it feels.

name: Yuki
message: "That's how I look, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You were reading my mind again? Get a hobby."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahahaha... Sorry."

name: Yuki
message: "It pains you when I'm being so cheerful, huh? I never would've imagined you saying those words."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, but as times passes and your appearances have grown closer together, even you must have started to realize how powerless you are."

name: Yuki
message: "That's ridiculous. It's not like I only just realized it. I knew I was powerless from the beginning."

name: Yuki
message: "I haven't accomplished anything! V for victory!"

name: Tomosane
message: "If you failed, then there's no victory..."

name: Yuki
message: "You think? Ahahahaha..."
Yuki laughed.
She laughs a lot lately.
But it was painful for me to look at that smile.
Sometimes her face... looks more like she's crying than smiling.

name: Tomosane
message: "You've maintained your existence for quite a while today."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, lately I've been working hard to stop myself from disappearing."

name: Tomosane
message: "To stop yourself from disappearing?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is that possible?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I'm really putting my all into it. I'm making sure that I don't lose consciousness, and I'm trying to commit everything that happens to memory."

name: Tomosane
message: "So you don't lose consciousness?"

name: Yuki
message: "You should understand, Tomosane. It's like trying not to fall asleep, I guess?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I guess you could say it's kind of like sleeping... Though I always disappear in an instant, so it's more like getting knocked out for me."

name: Tomosane
message: "I understand that part, but what do you mean about your memory?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you probably don't know what I mean."

name: Yuki
message: "Since you never have to worry about preserving the continuity of your memories."

name: Yuki
message: "You know, I have to be very careful to keep every memory I have fresh. If something fades from memory for a moment, it usually doesn't ever come back."

name: Tomosane
message: "It doesn't come back?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, from what I can gather, it seems like my memories have lost their continuity more than once."

name: Tomosane
message: "From what you can gather? What's that supposed to mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "Sadly enough, I don't know myself. This might be obvious, but since I'm losing my memories, I don't have any memories of what I've forgotten."

name: Yuki
message: "When I have that experience, I just think... What is it that makes a human being human?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What makes a human being human?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. What's necessary for a human to be human? What's necessary for me to be me?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Would that be... the continuity of memory?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. The one thing that I need to be me is my memory."

name: Yuki
message: "Losing one's memory is the same as losing one's self."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's a pretty grim way of putting it."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, and Hasaki says that she's seen me during those moments."

name: Tomosane
message: "You mean when you're talking to Hasaki?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. Until just recently, I've always seen Hasaki-chan as Hasaki-chan. But sometimes I'll see her as herself one moment, and then the next moment as the fictional person Wakatsuki Tsukasa."

name: Yuki
message: "I heard about it after the fact... But you know how she is. Hasaki-chan didn't want to tell me much about it."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see... So that's why you're working to preserve your continuity?"

name: Yuki
message: "Pretty much."

name: Tomosane
message: "Seems like it would wear you out."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, it does. But it's something I chose to do."

name: Tomosane
message: "Your memory makes you the person you are, huh..."

name: Yuki
message: "It's the reason you are you. When I think about who I am, it makes me realize how precious memory is."

name: Yuki
message: "If your memory is overwritten with new memories all the time, then there's no real proof that you really are you... Seriously."

name: Tomosane
message: "That has nothing to do with it..."

name: Yuki
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Memory... Realization... Even without those things, you are you."

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder about that. Besides, you've never met the new me."

name: Tomosane
message: "I guess I haven't met her yet, have I?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, and it's not just her memory that's messed up. Her perceptions are warped, too. She sees Hasaki-chan as Wakatsuki Tsukasa, and she thinks the rabbit doll is a girl called Wakatsuki Kagami."

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder how would she see you, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "Just a stranger, probably."

name: Yuki
message: "You think? I'm not really sure, but... if I'm still me, then I doubt I would ever see you as a stranger."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's just what you want to think. I'm sure I would just be a guy with an attitude problem."

name: Yuki
message: "I dunno... You wouldn't talk to me anymore if I was like that, would you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "The new you would probably hate me, so I would do my best to ignore you."

name: Yuki
message: "So you would hate the new me, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I never said I'd hate you."

name: Yuki
message: "But you wouldn't like me, would you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't know."

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder if you'd still love me even if I wasn't me anymore. I'd like to believe that you would still love me as passionately as you do now. Can I believe in you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait! I've never had any special feelings for you before!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahahaha... Gotcha."

name: Tomosane
message: "And besides, we probably wouldn't even be able to speak to each other."

name: Tomosane
message: "When you're completely cut off from the world, Mamiya and I will be gone. It's not a matter of whether we would see each other or not, since it would be impossible."

name: Yuki
message: "There you go again."

name: Yuki
message: "Even if I can't see you, I'd like you to keep existing."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you talking about? Once you're cut off, even those thoughts will disappear."

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe they'll disappear when it happens, but... right now, that's what I really want."

name: Yuki
message: "I don't care what the new me thinks. Right now I want you to keep existing."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... I just wanted to tell you, that's what I was thinking."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, that's right! Hasaki-chan!"
Yuki suddenly raised her voice.
She spoke in a voice that used our voicebox, so that other people could hear her speak.

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki-chan, why don't you sleep in my bed once in a while?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Upfh!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Yuki
message: "I know I look like a boy, but I'm a girl on the inside, so there's no danger."

name: Tomosane
message: "But I'm a guy on the inside and the outside!"

name: Hasaki
message: "But you said you weren't attracted to me, Tomo Nii-san, so there's no problem."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now you too?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I don't mind.
I want to spend as much time with Yuki-san as possible."

name: Tomosane
message: "W-Wait! I mind!"

name: Yuki
message: "Why?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You can't! You know damn well there's a problem with having a boy and a girl sleep in a bed together!"

name: Yuki
message: "What, so you really would get turned on?"

name: Tomosane
message: "N-No way!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Then it should be fine. It's not like I want to sleep with you, Tomo Nii-san. I want to sleep with Yuki-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "But it's the same thing! We share a body!"

name: Yuki
message: "But you said yourself it wouldn't be a problem. You just told us that you're not attracted to either one of us."

name: Tomosane
message: "I-It's a problem morally!"

name: Yuki
message: "There's a problem morally with two siblings sleeping in the same bed?"

name: Hasaki
message: "If not, then there should be no problem."

name: Tomosane
message: "U-Um, wait! What if Mamiya Takuji suddenly showed up?"

name: Yuki
message: "That won't happen. He refuses to recognize anything that would cause inconsistencies in his world, so he won't come out."

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You never know. He's a lolicon, a pedo, and a pervert, so he might..."

name: Hasaki
message: "If he does, then I'll handle it. There won't be a problem."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. Besides, Mamiya Takuji believes he's weaker than even a girl, right? He's not strong enough to overpower Hasaki."

name: Tomosane
message: "Even weaker than Hasaki? What a freak."

name: Tomosane
message: "So, now what?"

name: Yuki
message: "Let's get some sleep!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hell no!"

name: Yuki
message: "Why not? It's bedtime."

name: Tomosane
message: "So why are you sleeping in my room?! And why is Hasaki in her pajamas?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Because I'm going to sleep."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, that's not what I mean. Why in my room?"

name: Yuki
message: "What are you blabbering about? I moved in before you, so it's my room!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Whatever... All right, fine, I don't care about you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki, get out!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Why can Yuki-san stay, but I can't?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That should be obvious!"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's not a reason. I asked you why Yuki-san can stay, but I can't."

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't need a reason! We can't do anything separately!"

name: Yuki
message: "That's not true. I'm only barely holding on, so I could disappear any time you want."

name: Tomosane
message: "You can disappear?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Like I said, I feel like I'm gonna faint. Let me get some sleep."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then just disappear right now!"

name: Yuki
message: "No way. I held onto my consciousness for this long, so at least let me sleep in my own bed. You don't understand how stressful it is enduring this for so long, since you've never had to do it yourself!"

name: Yuki
message: "I feel so sleepy, almost like I stayed up four nights in a row."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then just disappear already!"

name: Yuki
message: "I endured it for so long. Why won't you just let me sleep in my bed?! Maybe you're the one who should just disappear already!"

name: Tomosane
message: "If I could conveniently disappear right now, I would! I'm telling you to disappear because I can't!"

name: Yuki
message: "Then why don't you practice until you can!
All right, I'm getting in bed!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Stop it, you dumbass. Ah..."

name: Yuki
message: "Ow! What are you doing?!"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's my line!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hm? What?"

name: Yuki
message: "How did it end up like this?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are you so calm... in this situation..."

name: Yuki
message: "You're the one who knocked me down."

name: Tomosane
message: "No! You were the one that fell!"
I've never been so glad Hasaki can't see us both. I don't understand how this happened.
I ended up on top of Yuki.

name: Yuki
message: "How about you get off me before you space out?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why?

name: Yuki
message: "Well, not like I really care, but my panties are showing."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wha―?"

name: Yuki
message: "Wait, did you flip up my skirt on purpose when we fell?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's ridiculous."

name: Yuki
message: "Really? Well, if you wanna take a looksie, just say so. Giving a bit of fanservice to my little virgin brother is just one of my duties as a sister."

name: Tomosane
message: "I really will kill you..."

name: Hasaki
message: "What's wrong, Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, Hasaki-chan, come in the bed with us."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you saying?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah!"

name: Tomosane
message: "No! Stop―whoa!"

name: Yuki
message: "Wow, the sheets are cool to the touch."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why are all three of us in the same bed?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "So fluffy..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki! Get out!"

name: Hasaki
message: "No. I don't like you because you always order me around, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "This is fun."

name: Tomosane
message: "This is not fun at all!"

name: Hasaki
message: "This is fun."

name: Yuki
message: "Look, Hasaki-chan is telling the truth. The majority vote says that this is fun!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You can't have a vote to decide if something's fun!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh right, Tomosane, do you wanna take a bath together next time?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, right!"

name: Yuki
message: "But what would you do if you had to take a bath when our personalities were overlapping?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Th-That's never happened before."

name: Yuki
message: "That's only because I wasn't able to control when I was awake. Now I'd be able to create just such a situation, if I wanted."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then it would be your fault!"

name: Yuki
message: "But it's still possible. Or would you just go days without a bath? That sounds like hell on earth."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't ask me! Anyway, I'm not taking a bath with you!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Couldn't you just wear a swimsuit?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right!"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not right!"

name: Hasaki
message: "If I wore a swimsuit, I could come in too."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, you couldn't!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Why?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Just think about it. Two siblings can't take a bath together in their swimsuits."

name: Hasaki
message: "Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, I don't see any problem with that."

name: Yuki
message: "Or rather... maybe it's only a problem because Tomosane would be looking at you with lust in his eyes?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Th-That's impossible!"

name: Yuki
message: "Besides, a swimsuit is something that you can show other people at the beach or the pool, so why's he overreacting like that?! What's your conclusion, Hasaki-chan?!"

name: Hasaki
message: "It's probably because he would get turned on."

name: Tomosane
message: "I would not! That's what I've been telling you!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Is that a fact?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ow, ow, ow, oww! Why are you pinching me, Hasaki?!"

name: Yuki
message: "That one was your fault. You can't tell a woman she's not attractive."

name: Tomosane
message: "But I wouldn't, you know? We're siblings. Isn't that perverted?"

name: Yuki
message: "Is that so? Then there should be no problem if I do this."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What are you doing?! Yuki, wait!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Wh-What are you doing, Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm just holding you close. He said it wouldn't be a problem, after all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't do that!"

name: Yuki
message: "And it's so narrow that I don't have much choice anyway. We hardly fit in the bed."

name: Tomosane
message: "Who cares if you're not covered? It's the middle of summer!"

name: Yuki
message: "We'll catch a cold, right, Hasaki-chan?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why would you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki-chan always sets the air conditioning to 27 degrees Celsius and sleeps under the covers."

name: Hasaki
message: "Otherwise I can't sleep..."

name: Yuki
message: "And today we set the air conditioning to 25 degrees because it's gonna be like an oven with three of us under the covers."

name: Hasaki
message: "So if we're not all under the covers, we'll catch a cold."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait, wait, I don't understand. Can't we at least sleep in separate beds?"

name: Yuki
message: "What do you think, Hasaki-chan? I think it feels better this way."

name: Hasaki
message: "I like this way too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah!"
Hasaki buried her face in my chest.
I couldn't believe how small and fragile she felt...

name: Yuki
message: "...What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Whoa, why are you holding her to my chest again?!"

name: Yuki
message: "You were just thinking about how good Hasaki-chan's little body felt."

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "N-No, I wasn't!"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes, you were. Lately, I've been able to hear your internal dialogue. You can't fool me."

name: Tomosane
message: "B-But that's... Sh-She's just cute like a puppy. She's my sister, you know? She's cute like any little sister..."

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki-chan is glad to hear that, even if it is that kind of cuteness."

name: Hasaki
message: "W-Well... It's better than hearing him say he's not interested at all."

name: Yuki
message: "Let me tell you a secret Hasaki-chan, just between the two of us. He's getting sexually aroused too."

name: Hasaki
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait! That's a lie! How would you know that?! You said you could only read my mind!"

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm... So you're not?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Absolutely not!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Absolutely not..."

name: Yuki
message: "Wow, it's really hot in here."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then get out of the bed."

name: Yuki
message: "That would be a bit cold. Oh, it must be because I'm still wearing my clothes. Let's take these off now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't take off your clothes for no reason!"

name: Yuki
message: "It's not like it really matters. I only exist in your head, after all. I'm taking my clothes off."

name: Tomosane
message: "W-Wait!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? D-Did she take them off?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, but only me. Tomosane didn't take anything off, so there's nothing to worry about."

name: Tomosane
message: "You've been able to do a lot of new things lately, haven't you?"

name: Yuki
message: "I've been around a lot longer than you. If you train your perceptions, you can control them more than you might think."

name: Tomosane
message: "You shouldn't use your brain's defects like that."

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder if they really are defects. Maybe they're actually special powers. It just depends on how you wanna look at it."

name: Hasaki
message: "Um, I'm a bit hot too, so..."

name: Tomosane
message: "W-Wait! You can't do that!"

name: Hasaki
message: "I already... pulled down my pajama bottoms."

name: Tomosane
message: "Pull them back up!"

name: Hasaki
message: "Why? You said I was just like a puppy, right? Would you get turned on by an animal if it wasn't wearing pants? If you saw a cat or dog without pants, would you get turned on?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, not at all... But even if you're cute like a puppy, we're still siblings, so..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Underwear is just a piece of fabric. It'll be okay... Besides, Yuki is already in her underwear, isn't she?"

name: Yuki
message: "Wow, Hasaki-chan, you can be a scary girl sometimes."

name: Hasaki
message: "No, uh, I was just a bit jealous. I heard you were really beautiful, Yuki-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "She's the only one who ever said that!"

name: Yuki
message: "You have to admit I look pretty good!"

name: Tomosane
message: "I have to? By what standard?"

name: Yuki
message: "Who cares about that? Let's get some sleep."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't wrap your leg around me!"

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez... Don't wrap your leg around me, don't snuggle with Hasaki... You sure have a lot of demands."

name: Tomosane
message: "I shouldn't have to demand them in the first place!"

name: Tomosane
message: "And Hasaki! Don't try to squeeze in between my arms just because you're small!"

name: Hasaki
message: "But I fit perfectly."

name: Tomosane
message: "You shouldn't just stick it in without thinking because it's a perfect fit, or else you might get in trouble with the law."

name: Yuki
message: "Like rape?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I-I wasn't talking about that! Like parking, or illegal dumping of waste!"

name: Hasaki
message: "You mean... you just think of me like you think about parking... or illegal dumping?"
Jeez, Hasaki is in a bad mood. It just keeps getting worse and worse. What's going on here?
But still, Hasaki's body sure is something. I always knew she was really small, but I didn't know she was like this.
She's just the right size to fit in the crook of my arm.

name: Yuki
message: "What do you think about my boobs on your back?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're vulgar."

name: Yuki
message: "What's your problem? I knew you were a lolicon that's obsessed with flat chests!"

name: Hasaki
message: "U-Um, Yuki-san, I'm not that flat-chested. I have a little bit there."

name: Yuki
message: "Really?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Well, I'm not an A cup. I'm a B cup... Though it is kinda loose on me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Isn't that still pretty much flat-chested?"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's not unusual at my age! Maybe I am on the small side, but I'm bigger than an AA cup or an AAA cup. Sometimes an A cup is too small and I don't fit."

name: Tomosane
message: "Sometimes you don't fit in an A cup, huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "But the most common size in my grade is a B cup, so I'm perfectly normal. My chest isn't that small."

name: Yuki
message: "Hasaki-chan, are you wearing a bra?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Oh, well, yeah..."

name: Yuki
message: "Why don't you take it off when you're sleeping?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Huh? Th-That's..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You don't need to do that! Now go to sleep!"
How unusual...

name: Yuki
message: "Zzzz."
I'd never seen Yuki's sleeping face before. She saw me sleeping once, but I never expected to do the same to her.
This had never happened before.

name: Tomosane
message: "Maybe this is the harbinger of a great change."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, Hasaki, you were awake?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, I just woke up."

name: Hasaki
message: "It must be rough for Yuki-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-Yeah..."
We haven't told Hasaki what it will really mean when Yuki is cut off.
Well, she probably understands more or less.

name: Hasaki
message: "I wish the three of us could live like this forever."
I was at a loss for words. No, I should just agree with her.
But as I looked at Hasaki's lonesome face, I couldn't find any words to say to her.

name: Tomosane
message: "The three of us, huh? That might be nice."
I don't know the future.
Only God knows what will happen in the future.
But that's what Hasaki wished for.
She wished for this life.
She wished for a plain, boring life where one day melts into the next.
And I can't even give her that.

name: Yuki
message: "Zzz."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can hear Yuki breathing in her sleep. And Hasaki too."

name: Tomosane
message: "I wonder if they're having good dreams."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... But..."
This place can't be their Wonderful Everyday. They have to grasp something new in the new world that's waiting for them.
After I pondered on it for a while, I went to sleep feeling like there actually was something I wanted to accomplish of my own free will for the very first time.
